channel.title: n0brains
channel.description: Think less, ship more. Two hosts break down what's actually happening in agentic AI — every few days.
channel.itunes:summary: Think less, ship more. Two hosts break down what's actually happening in agentic AI — every few days.
channel.itunes:author: n0brains

item.title: Ep 1: 10,000 Agents Need Attention
item.description: A startup raises $200M for 10,000 agents, coding agents waste 81% of time searching files, and OpenAI says human attention is the real bottleneck.
item.itunes:summary: A startup raises $200M for 10,000 agents, coding agents waste 81% of time searching files, and OpenAI says human attention is the real bottleneck.
item.itunes:author: n0brains
